title: Home
text:
Digital Marketing & SEO Specialist with experience in website content management, SEO optimization, paid media, and performance analytics.
I currently work as a Student Digital Marketing Assistant at Cal Poly Pomona, where I support website updates, SEO improvements, and campaign reporting.



SEO and website content optimization
Google Ads and Meta Ads campaign support
GA4, Google Tag Manager, and Looker Studio reporting
CMS-based website management
Performance analysis and digital insights





Managed website updates across 100+ pages
Supported paid media campaigns generating 600+ qualified leads
Managed a $10K Google Ads grant campaign
Worked across SEO, CRO, analytics, and digital campaign optimization
